stories.title: Intel on intriguing NBA free agents: What execs th...
stories.summary: What league insiders are saying about the lingering decisions for Austin Reaves, Jalen Duren and Mitchell Robinson this offseason.

stories.title: The fascinating conflict between drafting in the t...
stories.summary: The numbers show that drafting in the top five hasn't turned into NBA titles over the past 20 years.

stories.title: 4-time Cup champ Claude Lemieux dies at 60
stories.summary: Claude Lemieux, who won the Stanley Cup four times during a memorable NHL career, has died, the NHL Alumni Association announced Thursday. He was 60.

stories.title: Sources: Dart addresses Giants over Trump intro
stories.summary: Giants quarterback Jaxson Dart addressed teammates Wednesday during a team meeting to discuss his introduction of President Donald Trump at an event last week in New York, sources told ESPN and NFL Network.

stories.title: Celebrini, Canada stops U.S. in hockey worlds
stories.summary: Macklin Celebrini scored again and Jet Greaves stopped 34 shots as Canada beat the United States 4-0 to advance to the semifinals at the ice hockey world championship on Thursday.
